auth.dataWontBeSavedDesc: Without an account your lists, ratings and settings are stored only on this device. Clearing cache or reinstalling will permanently delete them.
auth.acceptTermsError: Please accept the Terms of Service and Privacy Policy to continue

profile.guestModeDesc: Guest mode — data stored on this device only
profile.dataSavedToAccount: Your lists, ratings and series progress will be saved to your account.
profile.checkEmailConfirm: Check your email to confirm your account!
profile.addViaMenu: Open any title and add via ⋯
profile.deleteListBody: "{{name}}" has {{count}} title(s). This cannot be undone.
profile.donateDesc: Cinimate is a free project. If you enjoy it, you can support it with crypto. Click an address to copy it.

home.saveMoviesHint: Save movies or like an actor to start
home.basedOnRatingsActors: Based on your ratings & liked actors · hover to remove
home.basedOnRatingsLists: Based on your ratings & lists · hover to remove
home.startHint: Save movies, rate what you watched, or like a favourite actor
home.listsEmptyDesc: Public community lists will appear here
home.listsComingSoonDesc: Community-curated lists are in development. Top picks, collections and rankings coming soon.
home.seasonalComingSoonDesc: The seasonal tab with curated collections, atmospheric picks and unique features is currently in development.

search.title: Search
search.orTypeTitle: Or type a title to search

roulette.addMoviesHint: Add at least 2 movies to your watchlist

about.twoLanguagesDesc: Full localisation: posters, overviews and titles switch to your chosen language.
about.smartRecsDesc: Algorithm builds a taste profile from ratings, liked actors and lists. The more you use it, the sharper it gets.
about.ratingsDesc: Rate after watching. 9–10 = strong signal for similar films. 1–3 = just this film, not the whole genre.
about.seriesTrackerDesc: Track which season and episode you're on. In-progress shows appear at the top of your queue.
about.rouletteDesc: Spin the wheel to pick from your queue. Perfect when you can't decide.
about.notInterestedDesc: Tap ✕ on a card — it vanishes forever. The algorithm learns and never shows it again.
about.likedActorsDesc: Like an actor and their filmography gets high-priority placement in your recs.
about.cloudSyncDesc: Sign in with email and everything syncs across every device.
about.moodFilterDesc: Pick a vibe — Scary, Action, Drama — and get a tuned feed instantly.
about.saveDesc: Add to Watchlist and mark what you've seen. For shows, track your exact episode.
about.rateDesc: Rate 1–10 after watching. Every rating fine-tunes the algorithm further.
about.discoverDesc: The "For You" tab is an infinite feed tuned precisely to your taste.
about.rating910Desc: Strongest seed. TMDB /recommendations finds the most similar films.
about.rating58Desc: Soft positive signal. Film is used as a seed with lower weight.
about.rating13Desc: Only this film is penalised. Genre is untouched — one bad film ≠ hate the genre.
about.likedActorDesc: Filmography added as candidates with 3× weight — higher than genre discover.
about.watchlistAlgoDesc: Queue genres get boosted. You chose these — similar content likely fits too.
about.notInterestedAlgoDesc: ID blacklisted permanently. Syncs to cloud — survives reinstalls.
about.tagline:
Discover films. Build your lists.
Get recommendations that actually work.
about.algoSub: Every action in the app shapes the next recommendation
about.footerTmdb: Movie data provided by The Movie Database (TMDB)
about.heroTagline:
Discover films. Build your lists.
Get recommendations that actually work.
about.howSub: The more you use it, the smarter the recommendations get
about.ctaSub: Free · No ads · On any device
about.moodSub: Tap a mood and get an instantly tuned selection of films
about.watchlistSub: Add films to your queue, mark watched, rate them. Everything syncs across devices.
about.footerDisclaimer: Disclaimer: CINIMATE is an independent application and is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or certified by The Movie Database (TMDB), Netflix, or any other film or streaming company. All film and TV data, posters, and related media are the property of their respective rights holders and are displayed under licence from TMDB. CINIMATE makes no warranties regarding the accuracy, completeness, or timeliness of any content displayed. Use of this application is at your own risk.

listeditor.privateListHint: Only you can see this list
listeditor.separateTrackingHint: Watched/queued in this list stays separate from your profile

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.s1p: By accessing or using CINIMATE ('the Service'), you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree to these terms, please do not use the Service.
terms.s2p: CINIMATE is a personal film and TV tracking application that allows users to discover content, maintain watchlists, rate films and series, and receive personalised recommendations based on their viewing preferences. The Service is provided free of charge and without advertisements.
terms.s3p1: You may use certain features of the Service without creating an account. However, to access cloud sync, personalised recommendations, and cross-device functionality, you must register with a valid email address and password.
terms.s3p2: You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account credentials and for all activities that occur under your account. You must notify us immediately of any unauthorised use of your account.
terms.s4p: You agree not to misuse the Service. Prohibited activities include, but are not limited to:
terms.s4l1: Attempting to access other users' accounts or data without authorisation
terms.s4l2: Using automated scripts or bots to scrape or access the Service at scale
terms.s4l3: Circumventing any technical measures used to protect the Service
terms.s4l4: Using the Service for any unlawful purpose or in violation of any applicable laws
terms.s4l5: Transmitting any content that is harmful, abusive, or violates the rights of others
terms.s5p1: CINIMATE uses data from The Movie Database (TMDB) to provide film and TV information including posters, descriptions, cast information, and ratings. This data is provided under the TMDB API terms and conditions. CINIMATE is not endorsed or certified by TMDB.
terms.s5p2: We are not responsible for the accuracy or completeness of third-party data displayed within the Service.
terms.s6p: The CINIMATE name, logo, and application interface design are the intellectual property of the Service's creators. Film and TV data, posters, and related media are the property of their respective owners and are used under licence from TMDB. You may not copy, reproduce, or distribute any part of the Service without prior written permission.
terms.s7p: The Service is provided 'as is' and 'as available' without warranties of any kind, express or implied. We do not guarantee that the Service will be error-free, uninterrupted, or continuously available. Film and TV data is sourced from third parties and may not always be accurate, complete, or up to date.
terms.s8p: To the maximum extent permitted by applicable law, CINIMATE and its creators shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages arising from your use of, or inability to use, the Service. This includes but is not limited to loss of data, loss of profits, or any other intangible losses.
terms.s9p: We reserve the right to suspend or terminate your access to the Service at our discretion, without notice, if we believe you have violated these Terms. You may delete your account at any time through the Profile settings.
terms.s10p: We reserve the right to modify these Terms at any time. We will make reasonable efforts to notify users of significant changes. Continued use of the Service after changes constitutes acceptance of the revised Terms.
terms.s11p: These Terms shall be governed by and construed in accordance with applicable law. Any disputes arising under these Terms shall be subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the relevant courts.
terms.s12p: If you have any questions about these Terms of Service, please contact us via the About page of the application.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.s1p: CINIMATE ('we', 'the Service') is committed to protecting your privacy. This Privacy Policy explains what information we collect, how we use it, and the choices you have regarding your data. By using the Service, you agree to the collection and use of information as described in this policy.
privacy.s2p: We collect information in two ways:
privacy.s2l1: Information you provide: When you create an account, we collect your email address and a hashed version of your password. We do not store your password in plain text.
privacy.s2l2: Information generated by your use: Your watchlist, ratings, 'not interested' selections, liked actors, and TV series progress are stored to power personalised recommendations and cloud sync.
privacy.s2l3: Guest mode: If you use the Service without an account, all data is stored locally on your device only and is never transmitted to our servers.
privacy.s3p: We use the information we collect to:
privacy.s3l1: Provide, maintain, and improve the Service
privacy.s3l2: Generate personalised film and TV recommendations
privacy.s3l3: Sync your data across multiple devices when you are signed in
privacy.s3l4: Maintain your watchlist, ratings, and progress across sessions
privacy.s3note: We do not use your personal information for advertising, and we do not sell your data to third parties.
privacy.s4p: Account data and user-generated content (watchlists, ratings, etc.) are stored securely using Supabase, a third-party cloud database provider. Data is encrypted in transit using HTTPS. We implement reasonable technical measures to protect your information, but no system is completely secure.
privacy.s5p: The Service uses the following third-party services:
privacy.s5l1: The Movie Database (TMDB): Provides all film and TV metadata, posters, and cast information. Queries to TMDB may include general request metadata but do not include your personal account information.
privacy.s5l2: Supabase: Provides database and authentication infrastructure for registered users.
privacy.s5l3: Vercel: Hosts the application front end.
privacy.s5note: Each of these services has its own privacy policy. We are not responsible for the privacy practices of these third parties.
privacy.s6p: The Service uses browser localStorage to store preferences such as your selected language, theme, and — in guest mode — your watchlist and ratings. Authentication tokens for signed-in users are stored in browser session storage managed by Supabase. We do not use tracking cookies or third-party advertising cookies.
privacy.s7l1: Access the personal data we hold about you
privacy.s7l2: Request deletion of your account and associated data via the Profile settings
privacy.s7l3: Use the Service in guest mode without providing any personal information
privacy.s7l4: Export or clear your locally stored data at any time by clearing browser storage
privacy.s8p: The Service is not directed at children under the age of 13. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children. If you believe a child has provided us with personal information, please contact us so we can take appropriate action.
privacy.s9p: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. We will notify users of material changes where reasonably practicable. Continued use of the Service after changes are posted constitutes acceptance of the revised policy.
privacy.s10p: If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy or how your data is handled, please reach out via the About page of the application.

community.title: Community Guidelines
community.s1p: CINIMATE is built for film and TV lovers. Our goal is to help you discover great content, track what you watch, and get recommendations that actually reflect your taste. These guidelines exist to keep the experience enjoyable for everyone.
community.s2p: When you rate a film or series, you're shaping your own recommendations. Rate honestly based on your genuine reaction — not to game the algorithm or to brigade a title. Your ratings are personal and are used solely to improve your own experience.
community.s2l1: Rate based on your actual opinion, not external pressure or trends
community.s2l2: A 9–10 signals 'find me more like this' — use it when you mean it
community.s2l3: A 1–3 penalises only that specific title, not the whole genre
community.s3p: Your watchlist is yours. Add whatever you genuinely intend to watch. The algorithm uses your watchlist to boost similar genres — keeping it accurate helps you get better recommendations.
community.s4p: Tapping ✕ on a card permanently removes that title from your feed. Use this feature for content you genuinely have no interest in — it trains the algorithm to understand your preferences better over time.
community.s5p: While CINIMATE is primarily a personal tool, any future community features should be used respectfully. We have zero tolerance for:
community.s5l1: Harassment, threats, or abusive behaviour toward other users
community.s5l2: Hate speech based on race, ethnicity, religion, gender, sexuality, disability, or any other characteristic
community.s5l3: Sharing or soliciting private information about other individuals
community.s5l4: Impersonating other users, public figures, or the CINIMATE team
community.s6p: Do not attempt to submit or display content that:
community.s6l1: Violates any applicable law or regulation
community.s6l2: Infringes on the intellectual property rights of others
community.s6l3: Contains malware, spam, or attempts to compromise the Service
community.s6l4: Is sexually explicit, violent, or otherwise harmful
community.s7p: Do not attempt to manipulate, scrape, or interfere with the Service's data or infrastructure. The recommendation algorithm depends on authentic user behaviour — artificial manipulation degrades the experience for everyone.
community.s8p: Violations of these guidelines may result in account suspension or permanent termination. We reserve the right to take action at our discretion to protect the integrity of the Service and its users.
community.s9p: If you have questions about these guidelines or wish to report a concern, please reach out via the About page of the application.

legal.englishPriority: In case of discrepancies between the version of this document in your language and the English version, the English version shall prevail.
